reference_outputs: {"answer": "GravitySpy is a citizen science project built on the Zooniverse platform that combines citizen science and ML to classify glitches in gravitational wave data."}
outputs: {"answer": "The GravitySpy project is a citizen science project that leverages the advantages of citizen science and machine learning (ML) to design a socio-computational system to analyze and characterize transients in gravitational wave (GW) data. The project uses the Zooniverse platform, where citizen scientists classify images of glitches, and the resulting categories are used as labels for supervised ML approaches. This process helps to improve the accuracy of ML algorithms in detecting and characterizing gravitational wave signals.\n\nSources: data\\Cuoco_2021_Mach._Learn.__Sci._Technol._2_011002.pdf, data\\1904.08693v2.pdf"}
